title: TheBoys:V-Awakening
description: This mod adds abilities from the TV series <The Boy>>, allowing players to use those abilities, including those of Train and Homelander.Future updates will introduce more superheroes and gradually refine the gameplay.Costumes for Train and Homelander hav
body:
This mod adds abilities from the TV series <<The Boys>>, allowing players to use those abilities, including those of Train and Homelander. Future updates will introduce more superheroes and gradually refine the gameplay. Costumes for Train and Homelander have been added, and wearing them triggers special effects. Use the command function hero.set:train to activate Train's abilities, and function hero.set:homelander to activate Homelander's abilities. Use the command function hero:clear to remove your superpowers.You can also use the following crafting table to make Homelander's outfit. If you have Homelander's abilities and wear the outfit, you'll learn how to fly.![黄色头发](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e293277a81c6689cc03fadc51e8cfb313ef70dc.png)![一件衣服](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36127e2cc92dcea6014d27bc279e6a19944b158e.png)![裤子](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30c595810955c595cf899dd57e9e3b41124a773b.png)![鞋子](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8c6be39280257ee63daba81ee0120eed564c9fb.png)
Hold down the forward and back keys on the keyboard to use your superpowers
Come form your very own version of The Boys!
